title: Clari-crystalline
content:
{{Top|canon=Clari-crystal}}
'''Clari-crystalline''' was an expensive substance that the wealthy often used in place of [[Transparisteel/Legends|Transparisteel]] as glazing for windows. While it offered a clearer view, a sharp tap could shatter it to a thousand pieces.

One known manufacturer of clari-crystalline was [[Congressional Crystalline]], a company based in the [[Senate District/Legends|Senate District]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. It was commissioned by [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] to repair her bedroom window after [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] shattered the window in pursuit of [[ASN-121/Legends|ASN-121]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Rebel Force: Uprising]]''
